description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and setting DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. Define stages build, test, and extract. Add a job named docker in the build stage that runs on all branches except master, executing docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/extract:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME ., and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/extract:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Add a job named docker_publish in the build stage that runs only on master, using the same image and service, and runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/extract:latest ., and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/extract:latest. Add a job named extract in the extract stage that runs only on master and triggers another pipeline via curl --request POST --form "token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN" --form ref=master https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/4409640/trigger/pipeline.
